title: Operator runbook: plugin + CLI setup, dogfood br for task lists
description: Document the plugin install + CLI usage as an operator runbook (docs/internal). Establish br as the canonical task-list surface for this and future workstreams.

title: Build + verify @protolabsai/mcp-server against the running server (:3008)
description: Build packages/mcp-server; verify start-mcp.sh launches and the MCP server reaches the API at http://localhost:3008 with AUTOMAKER_API_KEY. Confirm health_check + get_board_summary tools return.

title: Install protolabs Claude Code plugin locally + verify MCP studio server + skills
description: claude plugin marketplace add packages/mcp-server/plugins; claude plugin install protolabs. Verify the studio MCP server connects, tools enumerate (ENABLE_TOOL_SEARCH=auto:10), and the bundled skills (/board, /auto-mode, /cli-control, etc.) are available. Confirm SessionStart compaction-prime-directive hook loads.

title: Validate /cli-control skill end-to-end via the plugin
description: Once the plugin is installed (B2), exercise the cli-control skill (#3890) — confirm it drives the protomaker CLI correctly for common operator flows (board view, feature dispatch, status). File gaps.

title: Operator tooling: plugin setup + protomaker CLI validation
description: Get the protolabs Claude Code plugin installed + connected, validate the protomaker CLI against the running system, and dogfood br for our task lists. Umbrella for the plugin/CLI workstream.

title: Smoke-test protomaker CLI against the running system
description: Exercise the protomaker CLI (bin from @protolabsai/cli) against :3008: health, sitrep, board, feature list/get, query, pr check, agent list, auto-mode status. Capture outputs, verify against the API, file bugs for any breakage. CLI talks to the API directly so this runs now.
